name: Parallel positions (Meridian)

author.role: collective (imported material only) — this lens renders Meridian's own register-state reading, not The Middle's

purpose: Time collapses into register-state: the claims-ledger row before and after the session-33 correction, the correction rendered as an overlay with the original visible struck-not-erased, the appellate caveat at display prominence (mirroring the source's own amber sub-line), and the standing conditions as an obligation matrix with per-condition state. The derivative appears only as 'a downstream consumer that reported the gap' — deliberately its perspective, not the derivative's own.

selection.notes: Events 01/03/05 (design §3.3); Meridian's claims-row-12 framing assertion; both obligations, shown as the standing conditions Meridian holds toward downstream.

declared_exclusions.reason: Ensemble's transformation claim and boundary-case refusal are excluded here — the derivative appears only as 'a downstream consumer that reported the gap', deliberately its perspective and no more; see ensemble-transformation-v1 or the compare view.

Events 02/04/06/07 (Ensemble's own admission, transformation and publication chain) are excluded — this lens collapses time into register-state on Meridian's side only; see provenance-v1 for the full time-ordered chain.
